{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Hallister Halloway
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hallister Halloway]] is a one-star [[Ghost]] in the [[Ghost Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
